reason: Test tier: a top-of-pyramid acceptance/integration test under crates/console-cli/tests/ should run autonomous mode against resolvable and unresolvable decisions, asserting recorded command/outcome events for the former and retained needs-attention items for the latter. scenario: Scenario 11 -- Human valve and policy-edit commands map onto the orchestrator surface
reason: Top-of-pyramid acceptance/integration test tier under crates/console-cli/tests/ (the Scenario 7 precedent). All three of the scenario's scenes are now built and bound, each riding the shared orchestrator-action port and work_item outcome family: the Approve scene lands crates/console-cli/tests/scenario_11_approve_valve.rs (con-S1), the Reject scene lands crates/console-cli/tests/scenario_11_reject_valve.rs (con-S2), and the set-admission policy-edit scene lands crates/console-cli/tests/scenario_11_set_admission.rs (con-S3). The bound test path names the set-admission scene that completes coverage; the scenario is fully covered.
